# Risk classification

```{r}
#| label: load-prereqs
#| echo: false
#| message: false

# knitr options
source("_common.R")

```

## Traditional risk classification

<embed src="files/ca-3-1a-pdf.pdf"type="application/pdf" width="100%" height="1000px"></embed>

<embed src="files/ca-3-1b-notes.pdf"type="application/pdf" width="100%" height="1000px"></embed>

<embed src="files/ca-3-1c-notes.pdf"type="application/pdf" width="100%" height="1000px"></embed>

<embed src="files/ca-3-1d-notes.pdf"type="application/pdf" width="100%" height="1000px"></embed>

<embed src="files/ca-3-1-summary.pdf"type="application/pdf" width="100%" height="1000px"></embed>

## Multivariate classification



## Special classification



## Credibility
